name: Peach Walnut Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs, then add the molasses; beat thoroughly.
3. Peel and chop the peaches and stir into the mixture.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients and stir into the creamed mixture until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a pick inserted into the center comes out dry.
7. Cut into squares and top with whipped cream and peach slices if desired.
Makes 1 cake
